data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a post-completion certificate.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Post-completion certificate', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this feature is implemented. While the linked use case mentions the need for a post-completion certificate, it lacks concrete evidence of how this certificate is generated or managed through the API. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks for generating or managing the post-completion certificate.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the generation and management of the post-completion certificate.
